component.name: Tobe
component.summary: A privacy-focused YouTube client for desktop

description.p: Browse, search, and watch YouTube videos without ads or tracking. No Google account needed.

ul.li: Subscription feed — latest videos from all your subscribed channels in one place
Channel browsing — view channel videos, live streams, and info
Video playback with resolution switching and autoplay
Privacy — uses InnerTube API directly, no Google OAuth, no tracking scripts
